title: corispermum elongatum f. intermedium
intro: Corispermum elongatum f. intermedium, also known as the intermediate annual caraway or intermediate corispermum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. This plant is said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Corispermum elongatum f. intermedium include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and aid in digestion, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Corispermum elongatum f. intermedium is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be dried and used as a herbal tea or tincture.
